title: Upgrade village school beyond grade 7 to secondary school access near Ghatkesar
description: District Development Plan FY25-26 proposes upgrading feeder schools in Ghatkesar mandal to include secondary grades so children do not travel 6 km to the nearest high school.

title: Resurface Uppal main road junction near temple
description: Municipal roads department proposed resurfacing of the Uppal junction approach road — unrelated to school access.
